scripts.cap:sync: npm run build:mobile && cap sync android
scripts.android:debug: npm run cap:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug
scripts.test: npm run test:offline && node scripts/test-security-contract.mjs && node --check src/server.mjs && node --check public/js/02-data.js && node --check public/js/07-events.js && node --check public/js/08-platform.js && node --check public/service-worker.js
